description: Single large percentage number with a horizontal fill bar animating to the target value

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Chart title, e.g. 'SHARE OF ATTACKS USING PHISHING'
fields.PERCENT_VALUE: The number only, no % sign, e.g. '44'
fields.PERCENT_LABEL: Short label below the bar, e.g. 'OF ALL DATA BREACHES IN 2024'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: One line source or context, e.g. 'Source: Verizon DBIR 2024'
